# Art-is-Tree LLC

> Licensed and insured tree service company serving Virginia Beach and the greater Hampton Roads region of Virginia. We provide tree removal, tree trimming and pruning, stump grinding, crane-assisted removals, land clearing, and 24/7 emergency storm response. BBB A+ accredited, TCIA member, founded 2021.

## Key facts

- Business name: Art-is-Tree LLC
- Phone: (757) 319-5131
- Email: artistreeofvirginia@gmail.com
- Address: 2597 Nestlebrook Trl, Virginia Beach, VA 23456
- Hours: Open 24/7 for emergency tree service
- Free estimates: Yes
- Licensed & insured: Yes
- Accreditation: BBB A+ rated, Tree Care Industry Association (TCIA) member
- Primary service areas: Virginia Beach, Norfolk, Chesapeake, Portsmouth, Suffolk (all of Hampton Roads)
- Website: https://artistreevabeach.com

## Services

- [Tree Removal](https://artistreevabeach.com/services/tree-removal): Safe removal of hazardous, dead, or unwanted trees of any size, including tight-access and near-structure removals.
- [Tree Trimming & Pruning](https://artistreevabeach.com/services/tree-trimming): Crown thinning, deadwood removal, and structural pruning to keep trees healthy and safe.
- [Stump Grinding](https://artistreevabeach.com/services/stump-grinding): Below-grade stump grinding and removal to reclaim your yard.
- [Emergency Tree Service](https://artistreevabeach.com/services/emergency-tree-service): 24/7 storm-damage and fallen-tree response across Hampton Roads.
- [Crane Tree Removal](https://artistreevabeach.com/services/crane-removal): Crane-assisted removal for large or hard-to-reach trees.
- [Land & Lot Clearing](https://artistreevabeach.com/services/land-clearing): Clearing brush and trees for construction, development, or property improvement.

## Service areas

- [Virginia Beach](https://artistreevabeach.com/service-areas/virginia-beach)
- [Norfolk](https://artistreevabeach.com/service-areas/norfolk)

- [Portsmouth](https://artistreevabeach.com/service-areas/portsmouth)
- [Suffolk](https://artistreevabeach.com/service-areas/suffolk)

## FAQ

- [Frequently Asked Questions](https://artistreevabeach.com/faq): Answers on tree removal cost, permits in Virginia Beach, best time to trim, insurance coverage, and when a tree should be removed vs. saved.

## Case studies

- [Case Studies](https://artistreevabeach.com/case-studies): Real Hampton Roads tree projects covering crane safety, OSHA compliance, Chesapeake Bay Preservation Act work, property-value protection, and spikeless pruning.
